## Recovery — 2026-06-19 (AM)

**Found:** A dirty tree from scheduled sessions that ran after the 06-18 AM recovery without committing their churn (the 06-18 PM session downgraded to digest-only, then crashed rc1 before committing). 7 dirty paths, **all benign** — append-only audit streams, runtime artifacts from autonomous cycle `97dd1224` (heartbeat + history; timed out at 2h, 0 trades), and two completed session-result JSONs. No code, `.env`, masterplan, or trading-behavior file touched. No half-finished masterplan step, no `away-wip` checkpoint — 61.1 stays PASS, next AM step is 61.2.

**Material finding (recorded, not fixed):** The rail-4 `$0`-metered breach **recurred and worsened** — 06-18 PM sentinel read `$42.00` vs baseline `$8` (vs `$16.51` on 06-17). Both PM sessions auto-downgraded to digest-only correctly but crashed before raising the mandated P1. I consolidated the `METERED-BREACH-0617` ask into `METERED-BREACH-RECURRING` in `pending_tokens.json` and escalated the recommendation from ACCEPT to **INVESTIGATE** given the 2-of-3-day upward trend. Both 06-16 and 06-18 trading cycles hit the 2h timeout — a candidate cause (retry-bleed). Root cause is undiagnosed by design (needs an `llm_call_log` read, out of recovery scope per rail 8).

**Done:** One truthful `chore(away-ops)` commit (`7be476b3`) + auto-changelog commit, pushed to `origin/main`. No `git checkout/restore/stash` (rail 3). $0 metered, LLM-free, no subagents, launchctl untouched, main-only. **No masterplan step started** — the next AM session resumes with a clean tree.
